global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a robust body and a slightly hooked bill. It features a dark brown upper body and a lighter, mottled underbody. The wings are long and pointed, with a distinctive white patch near the base. The tail is broad and rounded, often with central feathers projecting slightly.
discriminative_attributes: Long pointed wings with white patch
Broad rounded tail with central projection

part_details.bill: Slightly hooked, medium length, dark at the tip.
part_details.wings: Long, pointed, dark brown with a white patch near the base.
part_details.tail: Broad, rounded, dark with central feathers projecting slightly.
part_details.body: Robust, dark brown upper, lighter mottled underbody.

spatial_relations: The wings extend laterally from the body.
The tail is positioned at the rear, projecting slightly.
The bill is located at the front of the head.
